option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.4.6</version> <relativePath/> </parent>
<groupId>com.example</groupId> <artifactId>demoCuoiKyBackEnd</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <name>demoCuoiKyBackEnd</name> <packaging>war</packaging>
<properties> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <java.version>21</java.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <!-- Embedded Tomcat + Spring MVC --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Keep WAR deploy compatibility (Tomcat provided when deployed to external container) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-tomcat</artifactId> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Hibernate + JPA annotations are used directly; keep ORM stable --> <dependency> <groupId>org.hibernate.orm</groupId> <artifactId>hibernate-core</artifactId> <version>6.6.0.Final</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-j</artifactId> <version>8.3.0</version> </dependency>
<!-- Gson is used by GSonAdapter --> <dependency> <groupId>com.google.code.gson</groupId> <artifactId>gson</artifactId> <version>2.11.0</version> </dependency>
<!-- JAXB runtime used by JaxAdapter --> <dependency> <groupId>org.glassfish.jaxb</groupId> <artifactId>jaxb-runtime</artifactId> <version>4.0.5</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.hibernate.validator</groupId> <artifactId>hibernate-validator</artifactId> <version>8.0.1.Final</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId> <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId> <version>2.17.0</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Swagger UI / OpenAPI for Spring MVC --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>2.8.9</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.4.6</version> <relativePath/> </parent>
<groupId>com.example</groupId> <artifactId>demoCuoiKyBackEnd</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <name>demoCuoiKyBackEnd</name> <packaging>war</packaging>
<properties> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <java.version>21</java.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <!-- Embedded Tomcat + Spring MVC --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Keep WAR deploy compatibility (Tomcat provided when deployed to external container) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-tomcat</artifactId> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Hibernate + JPA annotations are used directly; keep ORM stable --> <dependency> <groupId>org.hibernate.orm</groupId> <artifactId>hibernate-core</artifactId> <version>6.4.10.Final</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-j</artifactId> <version>8.3.0</version> </dependency>
<!-- Gson is used by GSonAdapter --> <dependency> <groupId>com.google.code.gson</groupId> <artifactId>gson</artifactId> <version>2.10.1</version> </dependency>
<!-- JAXB runtime used by JaxAdapter --> <dependency> <groupId>org.glassfish.jaxb</groupId> <artifactId>jaxb-runtime</artifactId> <version>4.0.5</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.hibernate.validator</groupId> <artifactId>hibernate-validator</artifactId> <version>8.0.1.Final</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId> <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId> <version>2.17.0</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Swagger UI / OpenAPI for Spring MVC --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>2.8.9</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE hibernate-configuration PUBLIC "-//Hibernate/Hibernate Configuration DTD 3.0//EN" "http://www.hibernate.org/dtd/hibernate-configuration-3.0.dtd"> <hibernate-configuration> <session-factory> <property name="connection.driver_class">com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver</property> <property name="connection.url">jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/ten_database_cua_ban</property> <property name="connection.username">root</property> <property name="connection.password">mat_khau</property>
<property name="dialect">org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLDialect</property> <property name="show_sql">true</property> <property name="hbm2ddl.auto">update</property> <!-- <mapping class="com.example.democuoikybackend.model.Laborer"/>--> </session-factory> </hibernate-configuration>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE hibernate-configuration PUBLIC "-//Hibernate/Hibernate Configuration DTD 3.0//EN" "http://www.hibernate.org/dtd/hibernate-configuration-3.0.dtd"> <hibernate-configuration> <session-factory> <property name="connection.driver_class">com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver</property> <property name="connection.url">jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/ten_database_cua_ban</property> <property name="connection.username">root</property> <property name="connection.password">mat_khau</property>
<property name="dialect">org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLDialect</property> <property name="show_sql">true</property> <property name="hbm2ddl.auto">update</property>
<mapping class="com.example.democuoikybackend.model.Laborer"/> </session-factory> </hibernate-configuration>
